data.name: Kindred Spirits on the Roof
data.detailed_description:
- Let’s Make This a Yuritopia! -

Kokonotsuboshi Girls' Academy of Commerce, a school built on the site of an old castle, known as "Shirojo." Toomi Yuna spends her time here on her own, until one day her lunch on the roof is suddenly interrupted by a pair of ghosts.

Enoki Sachi, who died in an accident before the war, and Nagatani Megumi, who died of illness thirty years ago. These "kindred spirits" died with unrequited feelings in their hearts, met, and fell in love. They hold an ardent wish to experience their "first time" together before their eternal rest...But they don't know how.

The two haunting spirits enlist Yuna to help them foster more "yuri" couples at the school, to assist girls struggling with their hidden feelings, and with the hope that their successes will help them glean the insight they need.
data.about_the_game:
- Let’s Make This a Yuritopia! -

Kokonotsuboshi Girls' Academy of Commerce, a school built on the site of an old castle, known as "Shirojo." Toomi Yuna spends her time here on her own, until one day her lunch on the roof is suddenly interrupted by a pair of ghosts.

Enoki Sachi, who died in an accident before the war, and Nagatani Megumi, who died of illness thirty years ago. These "kindred spirits" died with unrequited feelings in their hearts, met, and fell in love. They hold an ardent wish to experience their "first time" together before their eternal rest...But they don't know how.

The two haunting spirits enlist Yuna to help them foster more "yuri" couples at the school, to assist girls struggling with their hidden feelings, and with the hope that their successes will help them glean the insight they need.
data.short_description: During lunch one day, Toomi Yuna meets two "Kindred Spirits" on the roof of her school. When they insist she help them nurture young love, Yuna finds herself playing "yuri cupid" to six unique and adorable couples. Can she remain aloof or will the promise of a "yuritopia" reach her too?
data.reviews:
“Kindred Spirits on the Roof is an excellent visual novel, yuri romance focused or otherwise. Every character is imbued with a fantastic personality and the story is both light and heavy in proper measure. Reading through the main storyline is an absolute joy. It is fairly pricey at $35, but the quality and potential time spent is more than worth it. You’ll be extremely hard-pressed to find something more heartfelt than Kindred Spirits on the Roof.”
4/5 – HardcoreGamer

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista
  • 處理器: Pentium III 800 MHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 800x600 Full Color
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1100 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Direct Sound Compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or Better
  • 處理器: Pentium Ⅲ- 1.0GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OSX 10.7+
  • 處理器: 1Ghz or Faster Processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 800x600 Full Color
  • 儲存空間: 1100 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Direct Sound Compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.06 LTE+
  • 處理器: Pentium III 800 MHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 800x600 Full Color
  • 儲存空間: 1100 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Direct Sound Compatible
